summary: Execution Engine Phase 2 testing completed. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified - Execution Settings page loads with config form, toggle, mode selector, position size input, save button, and execution logs. Admin Execution Monitor page shows stats row and log table with filtering.
critical_code_review_comments: Execution config API correctly returns default config for new users
Paper mode execution works without exchange credentials
Testnet mode correctly rejects if no valid exchange credentials
Signal emission correctly restricted to strategy creator only
Admin logs endpoint correctly requires admin role
Execution Settings page has all required data-testid attributes
Toggle interaction works correctly (enabled/disabled state changes)
Execution logs display with status badges (success/failed/pending)
Admin Execution Monitor shows stats (Total, Success, Failed, Paper, Testnet)
Status filter works correctly on admin monitor page
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Pro user already had execution config and logs from previous setup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Execution Engine fully tested. Pro user has execution config (paper mode, enabled, size 0.01). Strategy d2dc6982 owned by free user can emit signals. Signal emission triggers paper execution for subscribed users with enabled configs. Admin can view all execution logs at /admin/execution-monitor. WebSocket alerts show connection errors but are non-critical (expected behavior).

tests_executed.test: GET /api/execution/configs/me returns default config for new user
tests_executed.details: Returns default config with paper mode, 0.001 size, disabled

tests_executed.test: GET /api/execution/configs/me returns existing config for pro user
tests_executed.details: Returns saved config with user_id, execution_mode, base_position_size

tests_executed.test: POST /api/execution/configs/me creates/updates config (paper mode)
tests_executed.details: Successfully updates config with paper mode, position size, enabled toggle

tests_executed.test: POST /api/execution/configs/me with testnet mode rejects if no valid exchange credentials
tests_executed.details: Returns 400 with 'Connect and validate your Binance Testnet API keys first'

tests_executed.test: POST /api/execution/configs/me requires authentication
tests_executed.details: Returns 401 without auth token

tests_executed.test: GET /api/execution/logs returns execution logs for authenticated user
tests_executed.details: Returns logs array with total count

tests_executed.test: GET /api/execution/logs with status filter
tests_executed.details: Filters logs by status correctly

tests_executed.test: GET /api/execution/logs requires authentication
tests_executed.details: Returns 401 without auth token

tests_executed.test: GET /api/execution/logs/admin returns all logs for admin
tests_executed.details: Admin can see all execution logs

tests_executed.test: GET /api/execution/logs/admin requires admin role
tests_executed.details: Returns 403 for non-admin users

tests_executed.test: POST /api/execution/emit-signal emits signal and triggers paper execution
tests_executed.details: Signal emitted with executions count and logs

tests_executed.test: POST /api/execution/emit-signal fails for non-creator
tests_executed.details: Returns 403 'Only the strategy creator can emit signals'

tests_executed.test: POST /api/execution/emit-signal fails for invalid strategy
tests_executed.details: Returns 404 'Strategy not found'

tests_executed.test: POST /api/execution/emit-signal requires authentication
tests_executed.details: Returns 401 without auth token

tests_executed.test: POST /api/execution/test-order fails without exchange credentials
tests_executed.details: Returns 400 'No valid exchange connection'

tests_executed.test: POST /api/execution/test-order requires authentication
tests_executed.details: Returns 401 without auth token

tests_executed.test: /me/execution-settings page loads with config form
tests_executed.details: Page loads with toggle, mode selector, position size input, save button

tests_executed.test: /me/execution-settings shows recent execution logs with status badges
tests_executed.details: Shows 'Recent Executions (2)' with success badges

tests_executed.test: Execution toggle on settings page can be toggled on/off
tests_executed.details: Toggle state changes from enabled to disabled on click

tests_executed.test: Save Settings button saves config and shows success toast
tests_executed.details: Toast shows 'Settings saved!'

tests_executed.test: /admin/execution-monitor page loads with stats row and log table
tests_executed.details: Shows Total: 2, Success: 2, Failed: 0, Paper: 2, Testnet: 0 with log table

tests_executed.test: Status filter on admin monitor works
tests_executed.details: Filtering by 'success' shows filtered results

mocked_apis_list: Binance Testnet (requires user API keys, paper mode simulates locally)
mocked_apis.note: Paper mode execution simulates orders without hitting Binance Testnet. Testnet mode requires valid API keys connected via Settings > Exchange.
